spec_match.rationale: Excellent. Perfectly exercises native CSS comma-separated queries over dual named containers (sidebar and main), demonstrating real layout changes when either resizer crosses its threshold.

interactive.rationale: Sliders allow resizing the sidebar and main viewport dynamically. The card stacking is executed entirely by the browser's engine.

edge_cases.rationale: Features superb programmatic feature detection of CSS @container list parsing using a CSSStyleSheet parse probe.

references.rationale: Links to ChromeStatus, MDN, and sibling concepts.

design_system.rationale: Very solid design integration, contrast compliance, layout dividers, and clean spacing.

summary: A highly complete and robust demonstration featuring programmatic syntax parsing checks and native resizers for multi-context grid adapter logic.
